company_name: Safe At Home Pet Sitting And Home Care LLC
tagline: Keeping Pets and Homes Safe. Giving You Peace of Mind.

hero.headline:
Your Pets Deserve Family-Level
Care at Home
hero.subheadline: Leaving your pets behind should never mean leaving them with strangers. Mike and Stephanie Pate, certified professional pet sitters and law enforcement veterans, treat every animal like their own. Stress-free care in your home, so you can travel with total peace of mind.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Pet & Home Care That Gives You<br class="hidden md:block"> Complete Peace of Mind
services.subtitle: Stop worrying about your pets and home while you are away. From daily walks to full house sitting, we handle everything so you can focus on your trip.

cards.title: Dog Walking
cards.description: Professional 30-minute ($30) or 60-minute ($50) walking sessions to keep your pup active, happy, and well-exercised while you are at work or away.

cards.title: Drop-In Visits
cards.description: In-home visits for feedings, potty breaks, medication administration, waste disposal, and litter box cleaning. Available in 30-minute ($30) or 60-minute ($50) sessions.

cards.title: House Sitting
cards.description: Comprehensive home security while you travel — package pickup, plant watering, mail collection, and coordination of house cleaning and lawn care services.

cards.title: Pet Taxi
cards.description: Safe, reliable transportation for your pet to and from grooming appointments, veterinary visits, and other destinations across DeSoto County.

cards.title: Package Pick-Up
cards.description: Secure retrieval and safekeeping of delivered packages while you are away from home, preventing theft and weather damage to your deliveries.

cards.title: Meet & Greet
cards.description: Free 30-minute initial consultation where Mike and Stephanie get to know you and your pets, discuss care needs, and answer every question before service begins.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Worry-Free Pet Care

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Meet & Greet
steps.description: Contact us and we will set up a complimentary 30-minute visit at your home. Your pets meet their sitters, and we go over every detail of their routine and your home needs.

steps.title: We Care for Everything
steps.description: Our certified, insured pet sitters arrive on schedule for every visit. Walks, feedings, medications, home checks — all handled with the same love and attention you would give.

steps.title: Travel with Peace of Mind
steps.description: Receive photo and video updates throughout the day. Your pets stay happy at home, your house stays secure, and you enjoy your time away completely stress-free.

about.label: Why Pet Owners Trust Us
about.headline: Veteran-Owned, Pet-Certified, and Voted DeSoto's Best
about.description: Founded by law enforcement veteran Mike Pate and his wife Stephanie, Safe At Home brings the discipline, reliability, and trustworthiness you would expect from a veteran-owned business. As Certified Professional Pet Sitters through Pet Sitters International, we treat every pet as our own. Voted DeSoto's Best Pet Sitter in both 2024 and 2025, we have earned the trust of families across DeSoto County through genuine love for animals and unwavering commitment to your peace of mind.

features.title: Law Enforcement Veterans
features.description: Mike and Stephanie bring decades of trust, discipline, and reliability from their law enforcement careers to every single visit.

features.title: Fully Insured Coverage
features.description: All pets and property are covered by business insurance during our care. Your home and animals are fully protected at all times.

features.title: Real-Time Photo & Video Updates
features.description: We send regular photos, videos, and detailed check-ins so you never have to wonder how your pets are doing while you are away.

pricing.headline: Simple, Transparent Pricing.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service that fits your needs. No hidden fees, no long-term contracts — just honest, reliable pet and home care.

guarantee.headline: Our "Peace of Mind" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any visit, we will come back and make it right at no additional charge. Your pets deserve the best care, and we will not rest until you feel confident in our service. That is the Safe At Home promise from one DeSoto County family to another.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We proudly serve all of DeSoto County, Mississippi, including Olive Branch, Hernando, and Southaven. If you are nearby, reach out and we will let you know if we can accommodate your area.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during visits?
faqs.answer: For the initial free Meet and Greet, yes — so we can learn your pets' routines and any special needs. After that, most clients provide us with a key or door code and we handle everything while you are away.

faqs.question: Are you insured and certified?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We are Certified Professional Pet Sitters through Pet Sitters International and carry full business insurance covering both your pets and your property during our care.

faqs.question: How do I book a visit?
faqs.answer: Simply call or text us at (662) 469-5939 or email stephanie.pate@safeathomedesoto.com. We will schedule a free Meet and Greet and set up your visits using our computerized scheduling system.

faqs.question: Can you administer medication to my pet?
faqs.answer: Yes, we handle medication administration as part of our Drop-In Visit service. During the Meet and Greet, we will go over all medication schedules and instructions to make sure your pet gets exactly what they need.

testimonials.name: Heather S.W.
testimonials.text: I can't recommend them enough. They saved me at the last minute, the day before my daughter's wedding. My pet sitter cancelled and she swooped in to save the day. My German shepherd is very finicky with strangers and she knew just how to handle him.

testimonials.name: Angeleah O.
testimonials.text: Stephanie does such a great job with my Minnie! I love that she checks in with me, sends updates, pictures and videos, and tells me everything she has done. Makes me feel so comfortable leaving my fur baby with her.

testimonials.name: Sandra M.
testimonials.text: Stephanie is not only professional but also prompt, ethical, and incredibly loving. My dog adores her too! She truly treats them like her own family.

contact.headline:
Ready for Pet Care You
Can Actually Trust?
contact.subtitle: Book a free, no-pressure Meet and Greet today. We will come to your home, meet your pets, and create a care plan tailored to your family's needs.

footer.description: Veteran-owned pet sitting and home care. Proudly serving DeSoto County since 2023.
footer.service_area: Serving Olive Branch, Hernando & Southaven, MS
